description: Verizon Cloud is dependable and secure for storage needs, but it lacks modern features and polish power users expect.
author: Elizabeth L.
pros: Reliable cloud storage with strong security, easy syncing across devices, and smooth integration for team file access.
cons: Interface feels dated, limited collaboration tools, and pricing can feel high compared to newer cloud competitors.

description: My overall experience is good. You can use it on any device you have the option for unlimited storage and have the capability of having access of Verizon cloud on computer where they can print out pictures email and so much more.
author: Ashley M.
pros: Verizon Cloud gives you option that works across various devices and operating systems of back up and sync your photos videos messages and so much more.
cons: The cons is the price and the not able to transfer data does not give option of since free storage which some other companies does

description: MY EXPERIENCE WITH VERIZON CLOUD HAS OVERALL BEEN GOOD. IT HAS HELPED US KEEP ALL INFO IN THE CLOUD AND WE CAN REVIEW IT FROM THE COMPANY PHONES.
author: YURI B.
pros: THE PROS OF VERIZON CLOUD IS THAT IT IS EASY TO USE AND IT IS BUILT IN APP ON YOUR PHONE. WE USE THIS SYSM ON THE COMPANY PHONES.
cons: THE CONS SO FAR ABOUT VERIZON CLOUD IS THAT SOMETIMES YOU NEED A PASSWORD AND SOMETIMES IT'S HARD TO REMEMBER IT.

review_title: Great for backing up your phone
author: Brent B.
pros: Backs up all your call log, photos, and messages.
cons: It costs more than google and has less storage space

author: Michael W.
pros: Verizon cloud was simple enough to pick up on the user end.
cons: As with much of Verizon, getting it set up was a bit of a pain.

description: My overall experience has been absolutley amazing!!! No issues what so ever!!!!
author: Tiffany G.
pros: I absolutly love verizon cloud! I love that it keeps all my pictures down to every file i have stored on my phone! An if/when i ever get another phone/device that all i need to do is sync it and everything is all there so i never have to worry about loosing anything i have stored on my phone. That once i sync it then my phone is all set up and i don't have to worry about nothing!!
cons: There is nothing bad to say about the cloud its absolutely perfect and great!!!

description: Overall, Verizon Cloud was easy to use and able to meet my needs. I can view my stored content on all my devices and at the end of the day, I feel like my data is well secured.
author: Joan C.
pros: Verizon Cloud was very easy to use and navigate. I feel the data I upload is safe and secure while still being able to access it throughout my different devices.
cons: The one thing about Verizon Cloud that I do not like is that they do not offer a greater amount of free storage. The amount of storage in the free plan is limited and you do have to purchase more storage if you have the need. Although, this is very common with most cloud services as well.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: So far it's been a great experience, always being able to access it.
author: Bryce F.
pros: I like having photos and videos go to the cloud instead of my own hard storage.
cons: It gets kind of slow, but I guess that's due to how much data is being used.

review_title: Verizon Cloud-An awesome solution for storage issues
description: It's an awesome tool that provides both the facilities of, storage and backup with other amazing features like sharing. There is no need to keep a separate storage device with you every time, Verizon Cloud is everything for you. It's the best tool to minimize your worries about data loss. Thanks, Verizon Cloud to provide your users such a nice platform.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: When I bought my mobile phone, I disabled Verizon Cloud from the application settings. I felt it will consume a lot of memory, but finally, I made the right decision and enabled the Verizon Cloud again. Now my storage issue is resolved. I can store everything on Verizon Cloud anytime, anywhere on my device. This is not the end, I can share content directly from my phone to another. It's very easy, just copy content from your phone to another phone. It means no need of installing a separate sharing tool on your device. It actually provides me a backup for my storage, which I can restore from Cloud to my phone anytime. I have a huge STORAGE BANK in my pocket now. It's not too much costly as compared to other similar software, which means providing more storage and light-weight on your wallet.
cons: It takes time to restore your data from backup, but it might be a connection issue. The rest of everything is fine and works properly.

author: Nur Zuhaira A.
pros: It's a fantastic solution, combining storing and restoring with additional capabilities like collaboration. When using Verizon Cloud, you don't need to carry a secondary hard drive with you at all times. In the event of data loss, this is the best approach. Verizon Cloud, thanks for providing your customers with such a user-friendly solution!
cons: The pricing of cloud services was the one thing I didn't enjoy about this product. Allowing users to pay once for limitless storage space would be an excellent addition. Restoring data from the backup might take some time, but the problem could be your broadband connection. Everything else is OK and operating normally.

author: harrison S.
pros: I enjoy using this software. It makes work so much easier and helps smooth my workflow.
cons: there aren't many cans to this software. it's very useful and works as advertised.

description: It the best I can’t complain about it I love it more than ever.
author: Richard M.
pros: Verizon cloud it was good to use I love it more than ever plus I am with Verizon as well
cons: It help me out to have backup but usually I use it for backup for information
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Abby C.
pros: This product helped in many ways, downloading and saving and backing up my most important properties for when it came to work and school, I believed that all of my documents were gone until this app popped up. I couldn't be thankful enough!
cons: At first this wasn't a feature the Verizon phone I had came with soni had to download it. The newer phones come with the app and makenit easily accessible

description: So far so good. They've been a really great deal of help seeing as I needed the storage for college.
author: Dustin O.
pros: I like the fact that it was easy to manage and didnt require many steps to store information as I needed.
cons: With everything that we use in life anything can always be improved but I think it's just right for me. Thanks Verizon

description: Overall experience was good and like to have a cloud backup solution for personal information
author: DON J.
pros: Verizon cloud was very easy to use and easy to set up. A great place to backup my data
cons: Seemed to duplicate what I was using with icloud

description: Overall this is a good program to have. The ability to back up your photos and pics in a click of a button is a good thing to have
author: Deandra T.
pros: I love the ability to back up data in a click of a button
cons: The thing I liked the least about this software was the price for a certain amount of gbs. A one time price for unlimited storage would be an amazing feature to add
